'''''Star Wars:''''' '''''Rookies''''' is a series of [[Star Wars comic books|webstrips]] published exclusively on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]], beginning in February [[2006]]. They comprise:
*''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]''
*''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]''
*''[[Rookies: Day Long Remembered]]''
*A future adaptation of ''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]''<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/26811283|board=Literature|thread=Celebration IV and the EU|user=Lord_Hydronium|date=2007-05-29|time=1:30 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801195937/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/celebration-iv-and-the-eu.26790509/page-5}}</ref>
